notes:
- Right-clicking a file to send to a friend now opens a dedicated window for that send, with the friend's avatar, status, and live progress
- When someone sends you a file, a new window pops up showing what is coming in and who it is from
- The send window auto-closes after a successful send; the receive window stays open until you close it
- Each friend gets their own window, so you can have multiple transfers going at the same time
